Trace Platform — metadata, module registry, and environment

Source: R/platform.R
trace-platform.Rd

The Trace Platform treats RTrace as its first module. Additional modules (DataTrace, DocsTrace, PackageQA, future language modules) register here at load time via register_module(), giving the platform a unified view of every installed capability.

Developed by RTrace Contributors.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
